emergency_routing_rules.fallback: send a crew within 4 hours and call the customer back to confirm arrival window

non_emergency_routing_rules: take the caller's name, address, and phone number, describe the work needed, and schedule a free on-site estimate

emergency.fallback: send a crew within 4 hours and call the customer back to confirm arrival window

routing_rules.non_emergency: take the caller's name, address, and phone number, describe the work needed, and schedule a free on-site estimate

call_transfer_rules.message_if_fails: I'm sorry I can't connect you to our team right now. Can I take your details so we can schedule a callback?

after_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller, determine if emergency, if yes collect name/number/address and attempt dispatch, if no take message and assure next-day callback.
office_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller, determine purpose, collect name and number, schedule appointment or transfer to team member, confirm next steps, close.
pricing_model: per-project quotes for landscaping and monthly recurring for lawn maintenance
average_job_value: 2000 for landscaping projects and $150 per month for maintenance
greeting_style: Hey there, thanks for calling GreenScape! How can we make your yard look amazing today?
call_objective: s is to schedule free estimates for new projects and sign up recurring lawn maintenance contracts
follow_up_procedure: send a digital proposal within 24 hours of the estimate, then follow up by text 3 days later
other_tools: Canva for design proposals and Instagram for marketing
notes: we offer 10% off the first month of any lawn maintenance contract.
